---
title: "Cameos from English History: The Wars of the Roses. Third Series. By the author of The Heir of Redclyffe."
---

## Cameos from English History: The Wars of the Roses. Third Series. By the author of The Heir of Redclyffe.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1877
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
